title: Esports DB
description: PandaScore esports data — matches, teams, players, tournaments, leagues.

game_overview.title: Game Coverage Overview
game_overview.description: How many leagues, series and tournaments does each game have? A quick snapshot of coverage across all titles.
game_overview.sql: SELECT v.name AS game, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leagues WHERE videogame_id = v.id) AS leagues, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM series WHERE videogame_id = v.id) AS series, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tournaments WHERE videogame_id = v.id) AS tournaments FROM videogames v ORDER BY leagues DESC

leagues_by_game.title: Leagues for a Game
leagues_by_game.description: Browse every league for a specific title. Try: Counter-Strike, Valorant, Dota 2, LoL, Overwatch, Rocket League, PUBG.
leagues_by_game.sql: SELECT v.name AS game, l.name AS league, l.url, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS series_count FROM leagues l JOIN videogames v ON v.id = l.videogame_id LEFT JOIN series s ON s.league_id = l.id WHERE v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%' GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY series_count DESC

top_leagues_by_activity.title: Most Active Leagues
top_leagues_by_activity.description: Which leagues have the most series? A ranking of the busiest competitive circuits. Leave Game blank for all titles. Try: Counter-Strike, Valorant, Dota 2.
top_leagues_by_activity.sql: SELECT l.name AS league, v.name AS game, COUNT(s.id) AS series_count FROM leagues l JOIN videogames v ON v.id = l.videogame_id JOIN series s ON s.league_id = l.id WHERE (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY series_count DESC LIMIT 50

premier_tournaments.title: Premier (S-Tier) Tournaments
premier_tournaments.description: The most prestigious events in esports — S-tier only: Majors, Worlds, Grand Finals. Prize pool shown as amount + currency. Leave Game or League blank to skip that filter.
premier_tournaments.sql: SELECT t.name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.begin_at, t.end_at, t.prizepool FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.tier = 's' AND (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') AND (:league = '' OR l.name LIKE '%' || :league || '%') ORDER BY t.begin_at DESC LIMIT 100

series_by_year.title: Competitive Seasons by Year
series_by_year.description: All series (competitive seasons) for a given year. Leave Game blank for all titles. Try: year = 2024, game = Valorant.
series_by_year.sql: SELECT s.full_name AS series, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, s.season, s.begin_at, s.end_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tournaments WHERE serie_id = s.id) AS tournament_count FROM series s JOIN videogames v ON v.id = s.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = s.league_id WHERE s.year = cast(:year as integer) AND (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') ORDER BY v.name, l.name, s.begin_at

league_history.title: League Season History
league_history.description: All series and tournaments ever run under a specific league. Enter a league name (or part of it) to trace its full history.
league_history.sql: SELECT l.name AS league, s.year, s.full_name AS series, s.season, s.begin_at, s.end_at, COUNT(t.id) AS tournaments FROM series s JOIN leagues l ON l.id = s.league_id LEFT JOIN tournaments t ON t.serie_id = s.id WHERE l.name LIKE '%' || :league || '%' GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.year DESC, s.begin_at DESC

tournament_tier_breakdown.title: Tournament Tiers by Game
tournament_tier_breakdown.description: How many S/A/B/C/D-tier events exist per game? Tiers reflect prestige: S = premier, A = top, B = mid, C/D = regional/open. Leave Game blank for all titles.
tournament_tier_breakdown.sql: SELECT v.name AS game, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.tier, ''), '(none)') AS tier, COUNT(*) AS tournament_count FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id WHERE (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') GROUP BY v.id, tier ORDER BY v.name, CASE tier WHEN 's' THEN 1 WHEN 'a' THEN 2 WHEN 'b' THEN 3 WHEN 'c' THEN 4 WHEN 'd' THEN 5 WHEN 'unranked' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END

recent_tournaments.title: Most Recent Tournaments
recent_tournaments.description: The latest completed tournaments. All filters are optional. Game: Counter-Strike, Valorant… Tier: s, a, b, c, d. League: IEM, VCT, BLAST… Name: partial tournament name.
recent_tournaments.sql: SELECT t.name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.tier, t.prizepool, t.begin_at, t.end_at FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.end_at IS NOT NULL AND (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') AND (:tier = '' OR t.tier = :tier) AND (:league = '' OR l.name LIKE '%' || :league || '%') AND (:name = '' OR t.name LIKE '%' || :name || '%') ORDER BY t.end_at DESC LIMIT 50

upcoming_tournaments.title: Upcoming Tournaments
upcoming_tournaments.description: Tournaments not yet started, sorted by earliest start date. Leave Game or Tier blank to skip that filter. Game: Counter-Strike, Valorant… Tier: s, a, b, c, d.
upcoming_tournaments.sql: SELECT t.name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.tier, t.prizepool, t.begin_at, t.end_at FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.begin_at > date('now') AND (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') AND (:tier = '' OR t.tier = :tier) ORDER BY t.begin_at ASC LIMIT 100

coverage_by_year.title: Historical Coverage by Year
coverage_by_year.description: How many tournaments were recorded per game per year? All filters are optional. Leave blank to see everything.
coverage_by_year.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', t.begin_at) AS year, v.name AS game, COUNT(*) AS tournaments FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id WHERE t.begin_at IS NOT NULL AND (:game = '' OR v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%') AND (:year = '' OR strftime('%Y', t.begin_at) = :year) GROUP BY year, v.id ORDER BY year DESC, tournaments DESC

videogames.description: Games covered in the database (Counter-Strike, Valorant, Dota 2, etc.)

series.description: Competitive seasons (series) within leagues, grouped by year

tournaments.description: Individual tournaments within series, with tier and prize pool information

players.description: Professional players with nationality, role, and active status

match_opponents.description: Teams or players participating in a match, with scores and win/loss result
